# reset()

**Instance Method**

Resets the queue.

## Declaration

```swift
func reset() throws
```

## Managing Queues

- **enqueue(_:)**: Enqueues an element in the queue.
- **dequeue()**: Dequeues an element from the queue.

items.description: Enqueues an element in the queue.
items.name: enqueue(_:)

items.description: Dequeues an element from the queue.
